allow: Bash(find C:\\Users\\SondreFalch\\OneDrive - Sifab AS\\Dokumenter - Felles\\Zigma360\\Projects\\SP-00525 and SP-00577 Prover NOA og Valhall Fenris\\02 Tilbud:*)
Bash(cd /c/Users/SondreFalch/SifabAS && python tools/email_client.py search --query "from:Tom prover" --folder inbox --limit 10)

Bash(python -c "
import fitz, sys, os
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
doc = fitz.open\('C:/Users/SondreFalch/SifabAS/downloads/44200001 Prover Service Manual.pdf'\)

# Extract images from key pages: 32 \(dimensions\), 37-39 \(installation/dimensions/anchor\), 107 \(bracket\)
output_dir = 'C:/Users/SondreFalch/SifabAS/downloads/prover_manual_images'
os.makedirs\(output_dir, exist_ok=True\)

target_pages = [31, 32, 33, 37, 38, 39, 106, 107]  # 0-indexed

for pg_idx in target_pages:
    page = doc.load_page\(pg_idx\)
    images = page.get_images\(full=True\)
    for img_idx, img in enumerate\(images\):
        xref = img[0]
        base = doc.extract_image\(xref\)
        img_bytes = base['image']
        ext = base['ext']
        fname = f'page{pg_idx+1}_img{img_idx+1}.{ext}'
        fpath = os.path.join\(output_dir, fname\)
        with open\(fpath, 'wb'\) as f:
            f.write\(img_bytes\)
        print\(f'Saved: {fname} \({len\(img_bytes\)} bytes\)'\)

    # Also render the full page as PNG
    pix = page.get_pixmap\(dpi=200\)
    pix.save\(os.path.join\(output_dir, f'page{pg_idx+1}_full.png'\)\)
    print\(f'Saved: page{pg_idx+1}_full.png'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)
